data.title: Visual Identity
data.description: Instagram’s vibrant and dynamic brand colors reflect creativity and modernity.

data.title: Community Focus
data.description: Strong emphasis on user-generated content and community building.
data.technical_spec: Support for live interactions, user tagging, and comments.

data.title: Mobile-First Design
data.description: Prioritizes mobile experience due to its large mobile user base.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design principles, native mobile app optimization.

data.title: Influencer Ecosystem
data.description: Cultivates an ecosystem where influencers thrive, which attracts brands and advertisers.
data.technical_spec: Integration of business tools, advertisement metrics.

data.title: Cultural Trendsetter
data.description: Acts as a trendsetter in social media design and features.
data.technical_spec: Innovative story formats, integrated AR effects.
